description: You are an Instructional Designer preparing a participant workbook for the 'Conflict Resolution & Authentic Leadership' workshop. Clean the master training guide at /home/ga/Documents/leadership_training_master.odt by removing all internal training notes (paragraphs beginning with '[FACILITATOR NOTE:' or '[TRAINER INSTRUCTION:'). Apply 'Heading 1' style to the four main Module titles and 'Heading 2' style to all sub-topics. Insert page breaks so that Modules 2, 3, and 4 each begin on a new page. In each of the four 'Personal Action Plan' sections, convert the tab-separated text for 'Goal', 'Action Steps', and 'Target Date' into a 3-column table. Save the updated document to /home/ga/Documents/leadership_training_master.odt.

expected_h1_sections: Module 1: The Foundations of Authentic Leadership
